productDisplayName: Doodle Boy Stop global warming Black Tshirts
description: Composition Black round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Join your little girl in spreading the word to save the earth from global warming with this black t-shirt from doodle. The short sleeves and chest print add an element of growing-up attitude to your little girl, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with capris and sneakers to complete her look.
